intended_use: The multifunctional ultrasound scanner is used to collect, display and analyze ultrasound images during ultrasound imaging procedures in combination with supported echographic probes. Main application
intended_use_full: The multifunctional ultrasound scanner is used to collect, display and analyze ultrasound images during ultrasound imaging procedures in combination with supported echographic probes. Main applications: Cardiac (Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric with Transesophageal invasive access), Vascular (Neonatal, Adult Cephalic, Vascular), General Imaging (Abdominal, Breast, Musculoskeletal, Neonatal, Pediatric, Small Organs, Thyroid, Urological with Intraoperative, Laparoscopic, Transrectal invasive access), Women Health (OB/Fetal, Gynecology with Transrectal, Transvaginal invasive access)
target_condition: Left atrium functional assessment; cardiac function evaluation including patients with myocardial infarction and coronary heart disease
ground_truth: TomTec AutoSTRAIN (part of TomTec Arena TTA2 LOT 42.0) used as reference standard for strain measurements
other_metrics: Intraclass Correlation Coefficient (ICC): LASr = 0.84, LAScd = 0.76, LASct = 0.74
